title: QuackysVanillaQOL
body:
# Quackys Vanilla QOL

## Purpose

If you want Minecraft to be more immersive, less of a pain and running smoother; than this modpack is for you!

- The only blocks/items added to the game are [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders), [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack), and [Camerapture](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture).
- Adds over 25 QOL mods to make Minecraft just that much better to play
- Adds basic Performance mods ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), etc...)
- Also includes BSL shaders as well as Primes HD Textures for better immersion
- More realistic audio experience

## Server Setup
- Read This Simple Guide [Here](https://github.com/donnie58744/Minecraft-QuackysVanillaQOL/blob/606873aa36349f7901dd10181135b73ae8a1a19c/SERVER.md)

## Modlist

### Performance

| Name                                                         | Author          | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [AsyncParticles](https://modrinth.com/mod/asyncparticles) | Harvey_Husky | Async particle tick/rendering |
| [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) | thosea          | A collection of mostly micro optimizations that add up to something bigger! |
| [Better Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities/) | cseden | BBE is a **client side** mod that drastically improves block entity rendering, and we aim to improve and regularly update the mod between Minecraft versions. |
| [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) | ishland | A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft. |
| [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)                    | jaredlll08      | Clumps groups XP orbs together into a single entity to reduce lag when there are many in a small area. On top of this, it also makes the player immediately collect the orbs once they touch the player, so you are not stuck with a bunch of orbs in your face. |
| [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)     | tr7zw           | This mod introduces **asynchronous path-tracing** to efficiently determine what's actually visible to the player. By leveraging multiple CPU cores, it calculates line-of-sight visibility in real-time and eliminates unnecessary draw calls for hidden block entities and entities. |
| [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)         | malte0811       | This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways. A high-level technical description of the changes is available [here](https://github.com/malte0811/FerriteCore/blob/main/summary.md). |
|[Get It Together, Drops!](https://modrinth.com/mod/get-it-together-drops)|bl4ckscor3|This mod adds two configuration options to control how dropped items combine on the ground. This can significantly improve performance in areas with lots of dropped items, like explosion craters or farms.|
|[GPU Booster](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape)|Mr.Toad|Provides DSA & fastest math formulas to game render system for best perfomance! Compatible with Sodium/Embeddium, Iris and shaders.|
| [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)  | RaphiMC         | ImmediatelyFast is an open source Minecraft mod which improves the immediate mode rendering performance of the client. |
| [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)                  | astei           | **Krypton is a work-in-progress.** I do not provide any guarantees about its stability, compatibility with other mods, or support for every possible setup out there. Support for this mod is provided on a "best-effort" basis. This is not my day job, it is a hobby growing out of related work I've done. |
| [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)                  | jellysquid3     | Lithium is a modern, general-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft which works to improve a number of systems (game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc) with the goal of **not changing any vanilla mechanics**. |
| [ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus) | embeddedt,Coredex | A fork of ModernFix that adds minor version update support. ModernFix is an all-in-one mod that **improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs** in modern Minecraft versions (most versions including and above 1.16 are supported) without majorly compromising the game experience. |
| [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)         | FX              | A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance |
| [Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)        | TonimatasDEV    | This mod increases the packet sizes to prevent various package erros. This mod could be used in mod packs for increasing the number of mods. |
| [Scalable Lux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) | ishland | A Fabric mod based on Starlight that improves the performance of light updates in Minecraft. |
| [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)                    | jellysquid3     | Sodium is a powerful optimization mod for the Minecraft client, which greatly improves frame rates and micro-stutter, while fixing many graphical issues in Minecraft. |
| [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)        | FlashyReese     | Sodium Extra aims to bring most of OptiFine's eye-candy options to Sodium; in addition to providing some features such as visual bug fixes and other performance options that are not yet available on Sodium. |
| [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) | lucko | spark is a performance profiler for Minecraft clients, servers and proxies. |

### QOL

| Name                                                         | Author          | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)          | Wisp Forest     | Accessories is a Data-Driven Accessory mod for NeoForge and Fabric with emphasis on using a Common API for both platforms when possible. |
| [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) | way2muchnoise   | Successor to BetterAchievements for the new advancements system in minecraft 1.12. Better Advancements tries to improve the UI and UX for the advancements system in minecraft 1.12+ in a modded environment. |
| [Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) | vladmarica      | A mod that displays each player's ping in the player list as a number. |
| [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)                | TreyRuffy       | BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD. You can customize colors, position, add spacings, and more. |
|[Bundle Inventory](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-inventory)|Socolio|Interactive inventory for Bundle|
|[Camerapture](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture)|chrrs|Take pictures using a working camera, show them to other players and hang them on your wall in picture frames!|
| [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)            | PepperCode1     | Continuity is a Minecraft mod that allows resource packs that use the OptiFine connected textures format, OptiFine emissive textures format (only for blocks and item models), or OptiFine custom block layers format to work without OptiFine. |
| [Chat Notify](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatnotify) | NotRyken | Plays a ping sound when your name is mentioned, with options to create custom alerts. |
| [Controlify 'Controller support'](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) | isxander        | A mod that adds the best **controller support** for Minecraft: Java Edition. |
| [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders)      | SuperMartijn642 | **Chunk Loaders** allows you keep chunks loaded with **different tiers of chunk loaders**! **Individual chunks** can be loaded though **a map** and the chunk loaders can load chunks in up to a **7 by 7 area**. Chunks loaded by the chunk loaders will also receive **random ticks**, so **crops, sugar cane and trees will keep growing**. |
|[Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)|TheIllusiveC4|Cherished Worlds is a mod that adds the ability to favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds.|
| [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) | Kira-NT         | A mod that allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window. This means you can keep the game open while interacting with other applications on a different monitor, or even directly on top of Minecraft itself, without the game minimizing. |
| [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) | A5b84           | A simple [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mod to make the loading screen darker. |
| [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) | jeseibel        | What does Distant Horizons do? Simply put, it add simplified terrain past Minecraft's default view distance to improve performance and allow for longer draw distances. Now you can finally enjoy that lookout tower you built on top of a mountain! |
|[Dismount Entity](https://modrinth.com/mod/dismount-entity)|Serilum|Dismount Entity is allows players to dismount mobs from boats, minecarts and other (modded) entities by crouch + right-clicking the vehicle. This will make them get out without having to break it. Dismounting other players is disabled by default, but can be toggled back on via the config.|
|[DropConfirm](https://modrinth.com/mod/drop-confirm)|mutt|DropConfirm is a **configurable quality-of-life mod** that adds a confirmation dialog when dropping items.|
| [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) | SuperMartijn642 | **Durability Tooltip** shows you the durability of items!    |
| [Enhanced Mob Spawners](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-mob-spawners) | andersblomqvist | Make Mob Spawners minable with silk touch. Change hardness of spawner block Right-click on a mob spawner and it will drop its monster egg corresponding to what type of entity inside. Adds a 4% chance for all entities to drop its monster egg (drop rate can be changed in config). Modify Spawner stats such as Count, Speed and Range. Example: make spawner active for a maximun of 128 blocks! Vanilla is 16. Toggle spawner ON/OFF with ingame config menu or Redstone. Option to turn on limited spawns, via config file! Control number of entities a spawner can spawn before it dies. (not supported in Forge 1.18). Spawner Key item - used to change spawner block behaviour. Change default range of all spawners (through config) |
| [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) | blackd          | Help you keep your inventory sorted Replace your quasi-broken tool Dump everything in that chest with one click Move the items you have that are also already in the chest Lock item slots in place so that sorting ignores them Keep locked slots empty Allow you to press R+C to set your shortcuts Be pure client-side, so that it works everywhere |
| [InventoryHUD+](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventoryhudplus) | DmitryLovin | Adds your main inventory, potion effects and your equipments to your HUD. And few other features. |
| [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)                  | PieKing1215     | Enables moving, jumping, sprinting, etc. from within inventories/screens. |
|[Invisible Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/invisible-frames-mod)|Roundaround|Easily toggle invisibility on your item frames by sneaking. It's as easy as that - sneak when you right click an item frame to toggle its invisibility state!|
| [Item Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-signs)|Roundaround|Place items into signs the same way you can with item frames! Works for signs of all materials, including both hanging and freestanding varieties!|
| [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)                      | Snownee         | Jade is the information HUD mod - Hwyla/Waila for modern Minecraft versions. Designed for better user experience and API. |
|[Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding)|Christofmeg|Just Enough Breeding (JEBr) is a JEI/REI/EMI plugin that displays useful breeding information for various mobs.|
|[Leaves Be Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/leaves-be-gone)|SHXRKIE|Leaves Be Gone makes leaves decay extremly rapid after cutting down the logs on a tree. All leaves are gone after about one second (configurable). Additionally Leaves Be Gone is extremely efficient compared to similar mods and works great with leaves added by other mods!|
| [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)            | masa            | Litematica is a modern schematic mod primarily targeting light mod loaders like LiteLoader on MC 1.12.x, Rift on MC 1.13.x and Fabric on MC 1.14+. |
|[Light Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-overlay) **Disable Shaders To See Lines**|shedaniel|A yellow cross means that mobs can spawn at night, a red cross means that mobs can spawn anytime.A blue cross means that mobs can spawn if there is a spawner (1.18 only). Press F7 to toggle the light overlay, configurable through Controls Settings.|
|[Load Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/loadsupport)|vaporvee|Shows when the player has too less Java memory allocated, and plays a sound when the game has finished loading.It is fully configurable in `config/loadsupport.toml`.|
| [MinecraftCapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcapes)    | james090500     | MinecraftCapes is a Mod designed for Minecraft which allows you to wear any cape you wish in-game, cost free. Getting our mod working correctly is easy, just follow the steps below. |
|[Main Menu Credits](https://modrinth.com/mod/main-menu-credits)|isxander|User can interact with the text like any chat message with click events and is underlined on hover if a click event is present.|
| [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)                 | Prospector      | Mod Menu lets you view the mods you have installed and, if supported by the mod, enables quick and easy access to the mod's config screens. |
| [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) | YaLTeR | Mouse Tweaks replaces the standard RMB dragging mechanic, adds two new LMB dragging mechanics and an ability to quickly move items with the scroll wheel. |
| [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) | Fuzs            | **Pick Up Notifier** adds a pick up log, a neat list shown in the corner of your screen. Including fancy little sprites! |
| [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) | Jam Core        | RightClickHarvest is a mod for Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge that allows harvesting crops and plants with just a right click. |
| [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)   | shedaniel       | *Clean and Customizable. An easy way to browse recipes.*     |
| [Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble) | chrrs | Scribble is a **client-side** mod to make editing books easier! It comes with a bunch of quality-of-life features, allowing you to precisely manage pages in your book, format text using colors and various modifiers, save/load your books to keep a backup, and much more! And the best thing is, **everyone else on the server can see this, even if they don't have the mod themselves!** |
| [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) | MisterPeModder  | This mod allows you to see a preview window of a shulker box contents when hovering above it in an inventory by pressing `shift`. |
| [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) | Exopandora | Shoulder Surfing Reloaded is a highly configurable third person camera mod for minecraft. |
| [Sit](https://modrinth.com/mod/bl4cks-sit/versions) | bl4ckscor3 | Allows you to sit on slabs and stairs. |
|[Text Formatting Everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/text-formatting-everywhere)|Potat369|Utility mod that returns an ability to use Minecraft's old formatting system.In order to format text, you simply put section sign (§), followed by formatting code, followed by your desired text. For instance: §1Hello, will color Hello into blue|
|[Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)|Tiviacz1337|..is a Minecraft mod, which adds unique backpacks. The mod is a successor of JavierDarkona's Adventure Backpack and since 1.16 all textures have been completely remade to fit the new style. Furthermore, functionality of backpack has been expanded by various new features. Traveler's Backpack is the official port.|
|[Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling)|henkelmax|Refresh villager trades without needing to break workstations|
|[Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves)|Patbox|It's a simple, but really customisable grave/death chest mod! You can customise as you like, by modifying message, blocks and hologram texts, how long it will be protected, if should drop items after expiring and alike.|
| [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)              | PinkGoosik      | Visuality is a simple client-sided cosmetic mod that will add a bunch of new particles such as crystal sparkles, particles on mob hitting, custom blob particles for slimes, environmental particles to your Minecraft world. Expect particles collection expanding with the mod updates |
| [What Are They Up To (Watut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to) | Corosus         | See when they're typing, in world and in GUI, the visual gets faster and wackier the faster you type! See when they're In a GUI such as inventory, chest, crafting, etc, shows their hand moving and clicking around at a screen in front of them. See when they're Idle for over 5 minutes. Shows them fall asleep in world. Shows a Zz indicator in the tab player list |
| [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)   | thexaero        | Unlike many other minimap mods, Xaero's minimap keeps the **aesthetic of vanilla Minecraft**, which helps it be a more seamless addition to the game. It is also **the first rotating square minimap for Minecraft.** Among a wide variety of customization settings, there is an option for a **circle-shaped minimap** and a separate setting for **locking the minimap's rotation** (using a direction arrow instead). |
| [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) | thexaero        | Xaero's World Map mod adds a self-writing fullscreen map to your Minecraft client. Works as a separate mod but is a lot better with Xaero's Minimap. The reason why it's available separately is to keep Xaero's Minimap as light-weight as possible. **This mod is mostly client-sided. Installing it on the server side is optional for some additional features like world identification.** |
|[Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)|shedaniel|Your options shall be respected, brought to you by the "Association for Options Rights" gang. This mod has one simple function, to provide default options if the corresponding option file doesn't exist.|

### Server

| Name                                                         | Author        | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [Better Compatibility Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-compatibility-checker) | Gaz492        | The forge server compatibility checker is not always accurate and can cause some issues with end-users of a modpack when they add a server, and it shows up as not compatible. This mod fixes that issue when used by modpacks, as it will compare the modpack project ID and the modpack version ID set in a config file by the modpack author and display a tick if they match or an X if they do not match. |
| [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)            | dzwdz         | This clientside mod adds player heads next to chat messages, as seen on the screenshot above. It makes telling various people in chat apart a bit easier, and it looks *hella* nice. |
| [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)        | fallen-breath | Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for literal IP server addresses |
| [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms)           | lucko         | LuckPerms is a permissions plugin/mod for Minecraft servers. It allows server admins to control what features players can use by creating groups and assigning permissions. |
| [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) | hengelmax     | A proximity voice chat for Minecraft with a variety of [addons](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/addons) that offer additional features and functionalities. |

### Visual

#### Mods

| Name                                                   | Author    | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
|[Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench)|Fuzs|Visual Workbench makes items put into a crafting table stay inside. Breaking the block drops everything on the ground, just like you'd expect. Oh, and crafting ingredients as well as the resulting item are also rendered on top. Really fancy if you ask me!

#### Shaders

| Name                                                   | Author    | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) | CaptTatsu | BSL Shaders is a shaderpack made exclusively for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful, and distinct. This shader includes realtime shadows, volumetric light, ambient occlusion, bloom, customizable clouds and water, and built in anti-aliasing. Additional effects are available, such as depth of field, motion blur, specular and normal mapping, celshading, world curvature, and more. |
| [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)          | coderbot  | A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs |

#### Resource Packs

| Name                                                         | Author     | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) | thebaum64  | Dramatic Skys is an add on pack that will make the skies in your game HD with realistic clouds and lighting. This pack works with any other resource pack, just simply add it over the other pack on the selection screen! |
| [Prime's HD Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/primes-hd-textures) | prime_mods | Prime’s HD Textures is a resource pack that overhauls vanilla Minecraft's textures by offering resolution options all the way up to 512x, and adding PBR for use with shaders. |

#### Other

| Name                                                    | Author | Description                                                  |
| :------------------------------------------------------ | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) | tr7zw  | **Replaces the normally flat second layer of player skins with a fully 3D-modeled version.** |

### Audio

| Name                                                         | Author      | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds)           | PieKing1215 | Minecraft Fabric/NeoForge mod that adds sounds for drip particles landing and other related changes |
| [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) | Sollace     | Expect to see a more rich and immersive Minecraft world, one where Presence Footsteps adds new and more dynamic sounds for every block the player walks on. Every block has its own material assigned to it, and can make their own, customized sounds to better match what they're made of. |
| [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) | henkelmax   | A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks. |

### Libraries

| Name                                                         | Author          | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)              | squeek502       | Adds various food-related HUD improvements. This is a mostly client-side mod, but it needs to be on the server in order to display accurate saturation/exhaustion values on the client. |
| [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) | MaxNeedsSnacks  | Architectury API is an api to abstract calls to fabric api and forge api as both loader has different implementations of what can be perceived as the same thing. |
|[Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)|Up|A components API for Quilt and Fabric that is easy, modular, and extremely fast.
| [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)    | shedaniel       | Cloth Config API is a config screen api.                     |
| [CoroUtil](https://modrinth.com/mod/coroutil)                | Corosus         | This mod is a giant collection of common code used between all my mods. Its technically 4 forge mods at the moment, coroai, buildmod, configmod, and extendedrenderer combined. |
|[Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)|Serilum|Collective is a shared library mod with common code for all of Serilum's mods.
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)            | modmuss50       | Essential hooks for modding with Fabric.                     |
| [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) | modmuss50       | This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods. |
| [JamLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/jamlib)                    | Jam Core        | JamLib provides: Platform abstractions A JSON5 config API A mod repost (9minecraft etc.) checker |
| [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)                    | blackd          | This is the GUI/Config library used by Inventory Profiles Next |
| [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)                  | masa            | MaLiLib is a library mod for client-side mods, containing most of the shared code between the dependent mods. For example it contains all the configuration options and serialization, a powerful keybind system, most of the Screen/GUI code and a bunch of other miscellaneous utility classes and methods for the mods that are built around MaLiLib. |
| [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)                  | Wisp Forest     | A general utility, GUI and config library for modding on Fabric and Quilt |
| [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)          | Fuzs            | Puzzles Lib is the core library that all my mods need to run. What does it do you ask? Most importantly it offers a bunch of abstractions for mod loader-specific code, which makes it very easy for me to develop all of my mods on multiple mod loaders simultaneously. |
| [SuperMartijn642's Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-config-lib) | SuperMartijn642 | **SuperMartijn642's Config Lib** allows you to **specify a config once** and it then **handles reloading values between world loads, syncing values with clients**, and **generating values for client- or server-only** on its own. |
| [SuperMartijn642's Core Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-core-lib) | SuperMartijn642 | SuperMartijn642's Core Lib adds lots of basic implementations for guis, blocks, tile entities, and network packets that allow for similar code between Minecraft |
